mapper.sql: c.id AS capability_id, c.capability_code, c.capability_name, c.description, v.source_type, v.source_key, v.source_version, v.behavior, v.version, v.input_schema, v.output_schema, v.policy_snapshot, g.field_policy, v.risk_level

FROM ai_capability_grant g INNER JOIN ai_capability c ON c.tenant_id = g.tenant_id AND c.id = g.capability_id AND c.del_flag = 0 AND c.enabled = 1 AND c.publish_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND c.risk_level IN ('MEDIUM', 'HIGH') AND c.visibility = 'DISCOVERABLE' AND ((c.source_type = 'BUSINESS_ACTION' AND c.behavior = 'ACTION') OR (c.source_type = 'FLOW_ACTION' AND c.behavior = 'FLOW')) INNER JOIN ai_capability_client cli ON cli.tenant_id = g.tenant_id AND cli.id = g.client_id AND cli.del_flag = 0 AND cli.status = 'ENABLED' AND (cli.expires_at IS NULL OR cli.expires_at > NOW()) INNER JOIN ai_capability_version v ON v.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND v.capability_id = c.id AND v.del_flag = 0 AND v.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND v.risk_level = c.risk_level AND v.visibility = 'DISCOVERABLE' AND ((v.source_type = 'BUSINESS_ACTION' AND v.behavior = 'ACTION') OR (v.source_type = 'FLOW_ACTION' AND v.behavior = 'FLOW')) AND v.source_type = c.source_type AND v.behavior = c.behavior AND v.version = CASE WHEN g.version_strategy = 'FOLLOW_MAJOR' AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.current_version, '.', 1) = SUBSTRING_INDEX(g.fixed_version, '.', 1) THEN c.current_version ELSE g.fixed_version END WHERE g.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND g.client_id = #{clientId} AND g.del_flag = 0 AND g.status = 'ENABLED' AND (g.expires_at IS NULL OR g.expires_at > NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT
AND (c.capability_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.capability_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND (c.capability_code > #{afterCode} OR (c.capability_code = #{afterCode} AND c.id > #{afterId}))
ORDER BY c.capability_code ASC, c.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
